(2) In configure_cache(), I'll append compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy as trailing kwargs passed through to Cache() - won't touch set_ttl/DSPY_CACHE/__all__ changes you add. (3) My get/put changes live in isolated new helper methods (_maybe_compress/_maybe_decompress) called at the start/end of existing get/put bodies - I'll add single call-site lines, not restructure the methods. Please do the same for TTL (append params, isolate logic in helpers) so our diffs are non-overlapping at the line level even though both touch these 2 files. OK to proceed on this basis?
